# TapYourBoat

> Boat rental and charter platform in Greece. Find and book boats, yachts, and sailing vessels for your next adventure.

## About

TapYourBoat is a boat rental marketplace connecting boat owners with travelers looking for boat charters and rentals across Greek destinations. Whether you're looking for a sailboat, motorboat, catamaran, or yacht, TapYourBoat makes it easy to find and book the perfect vessel.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://tapyourboat.com/)
- [Boat Rentals](https://tapyourboat.com/boat-rental)
- [Boat Types](https://tapyourboat.com/boat-types)
- [Charter Types](https://tapyourboat.com/charter-types)
- [Destinations](https://tapyourboat.com/destinations)
- [Blog](https://tapyourboat.com/blog)
- [Contact](https://tapyourboat.com/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://tapyourboat.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://tapyourboat.com/terms)
